title: Add "open link in new tab" to links in Quick Search
excerpt:

posts.author: eduardo_worktables (Eduardo Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday.com team!

I use monday’s Quick Search all the time, and since July I’ve experienced a downgrade in the UX. As of now it’s not possible to open a link from the quick search modal in a new tab, and that makes the usability of the platform worse than it was before.

Can you guys come back with the feature of opening links from the Quick Search in a new tab?

PS: I’m not the first to write a post about this in the forum, here is the link for other posts:

  • Quick Search Shortcut from Monday Docs (Keyboard Shortcut CTRL+B)
  • Quick search [strg+b] → open in new tab | Not working anymore
  • Open Boards in new tab with CTRL + B Quick Search function & scroll wheel middle click
